titleStmt.title: SII 23.78: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 78. (A.R. No. 78 of 1907.) Ambāsamudram, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Tirumūlanāthasvāmi temple—on the north wall of the central shrine Rājēndra-Chōḷa I: year 9: 1020-21 A.D.

summary.p: This records gifts of 25 sheep each by a merchant by name Vayiri Ayyāṟaṉ alias Poyyāmoḻichcheṭṭi of Rājēndraśōḻapuram and a Veḷḷāḷa named Kurundaṉ Poṉṉāḍai of Magiḻakkuṟichchi a quarter of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam for burning 2 lamps in the temple of Tiruchchālattuṟai Śrī-Mūlasthānamuḍaiyār, and another gift of cows for a lamp by a merchant of Rājēndraśōḻapuram named Nīlaṉ Paṇḍāri. Muḷḷināḍu is here stated to be a division of Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu in Rājarāja-maṇḍalam, while in No. 75 which is later the vaḷanāḍu is known by the name Muḍigoṇḍaśōḻavaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum cirtaṉiccelvviyum poṟccayap pāvaiyun=taṉ perun=teviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutuyar Ūḻi Ūḻiyuḷḷiṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭarvaṉaveli
paṭarvaṉavāciyumc cuḷḷic cūḻmatiḷk koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkaru muraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭalliḻattaraiyar tammuṭiyu māṅ kavar teviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyum
muṉṉavarpakkalt teṉṉavar vacca cun=taramuṭiyum min=tiraṉāramum teṇ ṭicai Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaikkeraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyum
ceṅkatirmālaiyum caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅkāval palapaḻan=tivum ceruvi ṟc ciṉavil Irupatt[ Orukā laraicu] kaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mel varuñ cāntimat tivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimi
ka mucaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta ca(ra)yaciṅkaṉ tamaṟpperumpaḻiyoṭu piṭiyilliraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarailakkamum navaneti kulapperumalaikaḷum māp porutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmarāyiṉa śrīrājentra
coḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 9- tāvatu rājarāja maṇṭalattu rājentracoḻavaḷa nāṭṭu muḷḷiṉāṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīrājarājacaturvetimaṅkalattu tiruccālaittuṟai śrīmulastāṉamuṭaiyāṟkku rājentracoḻapurattu
Irukkum viyāpāri vayiri Ayyāṟaṉāṉa poyyāmoḻicceṭṭi Ucci tiru non=tāviḷakkukku vaitta cāvāmuvāpperāṭu 2 10 5 Inney Āḻākkum Aṭṭakkaṭavāṉ Ivvūr Irukkum paṭaittalaivaṉ cāttān ce
n=til Ivaṉukku puṇaippaṭṭāṉ tūtuvaṉ śrīrājarāja caturvetimaṅ kalattu teṉpiṭākai makiḻakkuṟicci Irukkum veḷḷāḷaṉ kurun=taṉ poṉṉāṭaiyeṉ Emmāmaṉ kūṟṟaṉ nakkavirāṉaic cātti tiruc cālaituṟai śrī
mulastānamuṭai Āḻvāṟku vaicca tirunon=tāviḷakkukku vaicca cāvāmuvāperāṭu 2 10 5 Inney Āḻākkum Aṭṭakkaṭavāṉ Ivvūr Irukkum paṭaittalaivaṉ paṭṭa tūtuvaṉ Ivaṉukku pu
ṇai cāttan cen=til nilaiviḷakku 1 Irājen=tiracoḻapurattil Irukkum viyāpāri nilaṉ paṇṭāri Irācarācacaturvetimaṅkalattu tiruccālait tuṟai śrīmulastāṉattāḻvarkku vaitta tirunon=tāviḷakku Arai viḷakkiṉukku
vaitta pacu paṉṉiraṇṭaraiyiṉāl ney Āḻākkum Aṭṭakkaṭavāṉ Iṭai yaṉ kuṟṟālam kūṟṟaṉ Ivaṉṉukku puṇai kaṟṟaḷi cen=til celvaṉ paṇṭāri vaicca nilaiviḷakku 1 .
Digital edition of SII 23.78 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
